steps.title: The Locked Estate
steps.summary: Detective Lena Marlowe arrives after the body of Professor Adrian Wren is found and orders the snowbound estate sealed.
reveals: The suspects cannot leave the estate.

steps.title: Initial Scene Sweep
steps.summary: The detective notices the unusual puncture wound and the disturbed display case before ordering toxicology.
reveals: The death may not be a natural collapse.

steps.title: Host Under Pressure
steps.summary: Evelyn admits the victim planned to make a damaging announcement, exposing a circle of motives.
reveals: The victim intended to accuse someone publicly that night.

steps.title: Tea Service Suspicion
steps.summary: Nora's fingerprints on the cracked teacup make her the first apparent suspect.
reveals: Nora handled the victim's last drink.

steps.title: Archive Alibi Verification
steps.summary: A catalog terminal log confirms Nora worked in the archive earlier than claimed but left before the murder window closed.
reveals: Nora's alibi is partial and requires more scrutiny.

steps.title: The Author's Resentment
steps.summary: Miles reveals the victim threatened to expose his plagiarism, strengthening motive but not method.
reveals: Miles had reason to hate the victim.

steps.title: Observatory Alibi Verification
steps.summary: A voice recorder timeline shows Miles stopped dictating before the critical minutes, weakening but not collapsing his alibi.
reveals: Miles cannot account for every minute around the murder.

steps.title: Financial Secrets in the Ashes
steps.summary: The burned ledger scrap suggests Evelyn hid embezzlement, creating a powerful but misleading murder theory.
reveals: Evelyn has a secret unrelated to the killing.

steps.title: Poison by Puncture
steps.summary: Toxicology rules out poisoned tea and proves the victim was attacked with a digitalis-coated object.

steps.title: The Missing Minutes
steps.summary: Security logs reveal a manual deletion in the east corridor footage during the murder window.
reveals: Someone with security access manipulated the cameras.

steps.title: A Witness Is Silenced
steps.summary: Before Nora can explain a message she overheard, someone ransacks her desk and removes a note, signaling active interference.
reveals: The killer is still shaping the investigation.

steps.title: Message to the Map Room
steps.summary: A recovered phone extract shows the victim was lured to the map room by a message from Julian's device.
reveals: Julian contacted the victim just before the murder.

steps.title: Boot Prints Through the Basement
steps.summary: Wet boot prints trace a path from the generator control panel toward the east stair, aligning with a staged outage.
reveals: The generator fault may have been manufactured.

steps.title: Red Herring Cleared
steps.summary: The detective reconstructs the tea timeline and clears Nora, while Evelyn's fraud is split off as a separate offense.
reveals: The real killer relied on the confusion created by side scandals.

steps.title: Means, Motive, Opportunity Aligned
steps.summary: Julian alone had security access, a reason to stop the victim's revelation, and a route hidden by the outage.
reveals: The evidence chain now centers on Julian.

steps.title: Confrontation in the Map Room
steps.summary: The detective recreates the murder and confronts Julian with the deleted footage, the message extract, the toxin trace, and the staged outage.
reveals: Julian's basement alibi collapses under the evidence.

steps.title: The Hidden Grudge
steps.summary: Pressed by the complete chain of evidence, Julian admits he killed the professor before his own fraud could be exposed.
reveals: The motive and method are fully confirmed.
